title: Rofl Sounds
description: ROFL Sounds is a fun and ASMR-friendly sound pack for Minecraft 1.8 PvP games like Bedwars. It features smooth, meme-style hit and kill sounds that make gameplay both satisfying and entertaining—perfect for content and chill PvP sessions.
body:
## 🎧 ASMR PvP Soundpack for 1.8.9

A clean, lightweight soundpack that replaces PvP and bridging sounds with soft, satisfying ASMR audio. Perfect for:

- 🛏️ Bedwars
- 🗡️ Skywars
- 🧱 Bridging practice

### ✅ Replaces:
- Block place/break
- Hit and damage sounds
- TNT and explosion
- XP pickup & UI sounds

Made for smooth PvP and low-fatigue gameplay.

> **Note:** This pack only changes sounds. It’s fully client-side.
